name: saga_nodes
description: Four level-map node buttons, one family: CURRENT — glowing teal rounded-square tile with a bright rim; DEFAULT — cream rounded-square tile, calm and unlit; LOCKED — the cream tile with a small gold padlock on its lower edge; COMPLETE — the cream tile with a gold star stamped in its center.
prompt_extra: identical tile shape, corner radius, outline and lighting across all four cells; no numbers or letters on the tiles

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
